{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Bridge (Cradle)
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] and [[Ruby]] cannot practice moving with the Bridge.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Bridge]] is [[Yerin]]'s ticket away.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“You’re the reason we can’t practice moving with the Bridge!”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
